name: Securetech Innovations, Inc.
business: SecureTech Innovations, Inc. is a technology-driven company focused on developing and commercializing artificial intelligence driven manufacturing systems, blockchain based digital infrastructure, and innovative automotive safety technologies. It operates through three primary business units: AI UltraProd, Piranha Blockchain, and Terra Nova Technologies (Top Kontrol product line). AI UltraProd, acquired on June 23, 2025, currently generates substantially all of consolidated revenues.

exposures.sentence: Robotic products and hardware equipment include systems used in construction, renewable energy, port logistics, autonomous warehousing, AI computing centers, smart hospitals, smart campuses, smart water management systems, and other intelligent infrastructure applications.

catalysts.event: Spin-off of Terra Nova Technologies (Top Kontrol product line) onto OTCQB marketplace
catalysts.sentence: Terra Nova Technologies (Top Kontrol product line), a legacy product line undergoing restructuring in preparation for a planned spin off onto the OTCQB marketplace.
However, execution of our growth strategy including a planned uplisting to a national exchange, continued M&A activity, and the spin-off of Top Kontrol will require additional capital.
